zh.Playford, , Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可普萊易福德
zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Sampson Knight於1464年出生在英國素福爾可普萊易福德。他於1489年與Katherine Leventhorpe在英國素福爾可普萊易福德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1520年在英國素福爾可普萊易福德享年56歲。

zh-hans.Playford, , Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可普萊易福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Sampson Knight于1464年出生在英国素福爾可普萊易福德。他于1489年与Katherine Leventhorpe在英国素福爾可普萊易福德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1520年在英国素福爾可普萊易福德享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sampson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Welsh, and Jewish: variant of Samson . The -p- was introduced in the Greek transliteration of the Hebrew name Shimshon.

English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from any of the French places called Saint-Samson (Seine-Maritime, Calvados), including Saint-Samson-de-Bonfosse (Manche) and Saint-Samson-de-la-Roque (Eure), so called from the dedication of their churches to Saint Samson of Dol, the Welsh bishop (see   Samson  ).
Americanized form of French, Breton, German, and Dutch   Samson  .

variants.name: Samson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Jacques, Andre, Alain, Herve, Pierre, Adelard, Arianne, Cecile, Dieudonne, Gedeon, Henri.

English, Welsh, French, Breton, German, Dutch, Jewish, Filipino, African (mainly Nigeria, Tanzania, and Ethiopia), and West Indian (mainly Haiti); Hungarian (Sámson): from the Biblical personal name Samson (Hebrew Shimshon, a diminutive of shemesh ‘sun’). Among Christians it was sometimes chosen as a personal name or nickname with reference to the great strength of the Biblical hero (Judges 13–16). In Wales another association was with the 6th-century Welsh bishop Samson, who traveled to Brittany, where he died and was greatly venerated. His name, which is probably an altered form of an unknown Celtic original, was popularized in England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror, and to some extent independently from Wales. The English surname has been established in Ireland since the 14th century. In France, this surname is most common in Morbihan (Brittany). Compare Sampson . — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, the Ethiopian name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.
Filipino: Chinese Filipino surname formed with Chinese 孫 or sūn ‘grandchild’ as the second element. The first element, 三 in Chinese, means ‘third’, a reference to birth order. See also 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Sampson Knight was born in 1464, in Playford, Suffolk, England. He married Katherine Leventhorpe in 1489, in Playford, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1520, in Playford, Suffolk, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Sampson Knight est né en 1464, à Playford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Il a épousé Katherine Leventhorpe en 1489, à Playford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1520, à Playford, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir John Sampson Knight wurde 1464 in Playford, Suffolk, England geboren. Er hat 1489 in Playford, Suffolk, England Katherine Leventhorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1520 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Playford, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Sir John Sampson Knight è nato il nel 1464 nel Playford, Suffolk, England. Lui sposato Katherine Leventhorpe nel 1489, nel Playford, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1520, nel Playford, Suffolk, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.Playford, , Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクプレイフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Sampson Knightは1464年にイギリススフォルクプレイフォードで生まれた。1489年にイギリススフォルクプレイフォードでKatherine Leventhorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1520年にイギリススフォルクプレイフォードで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Sampson Knight(은)는 1464년 영국 수폴크 플레이퍼드에서 태어났다. 그는 1489년 영국 수폴크 플레이퍼드에서 Katherine Leventhorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1520년 영국 수폴크 플레이퍼드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir John Sampson Knight nasceu em 1464, em Playford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Katherine Leventhorpe em 1489, em Playford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1520, em Playford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Sampson Knight родился в 1464 г. в местности плеифорд, суффолк, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Leventhorpe в 1489 г. в местности плеифорд, суффолк, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1520 г. в местности плеифорд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir John Sampson Knight nació en 1464, en Playford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Se casó con Katherine Leventhorpe en 1489, en Playford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1520, en Playford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
